reason: The published spring-boot-starter-data-jdbc-4.0.6 JAR contains only META-INF/MANIFEST.MF, LICENSE.txt, and NOTICE.txt and no JVM class files; it is a dependency starter whose runtime classes are supplied by dependencies.
replacement: Use class-bearing dependencies such as org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-data-jdbc:4.0.6 and org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-jdbc:4.0.6 for reachability metadata.
